# CANDIDATE: MIDDAY_TRENDLINE_GATE

**Filed:** 2026-05-31
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** filter_change
**Status:** RATIFICATION_READY — J Rule 9 weekend ratification in progress

## Hypothesis

Block single-trigger trendline_rejection entries during 11:30–14:00 ET window. Midday chop zone produces 1-trigger setups that consistently lose to premium-stop. Adding a second trigger (confluence, level, or ribbon flip) filters noise while preserving genuine midday setups.

## Mechanism

- **Entry gate:** If time is between 11:30 ET and 14:00 ET AND trendline_rejection fires with `n_triggers == 1`, BLOCK the entry.
- **Pass condition:** If `n_triggers >= 2` OR time outside window, allow entry.
- **Exit logic:** Unchanged (premium stop, chart stop, TP1, runner per existing params)

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

| J day | Current engine behavior | Proposed behavior | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | Entry at 12:15 (midday, 1-trig) → -15/contract | BLOCKED (1-trig in window) | +19/contract saved |
| 5/01 winner | Entry at 13:35 (PM, 2-trig: level+confluence) | ALLOWED (2-trig) | PRESERVED |
| 5/04 winner | Entry at 11:15 (midday, HIGH conf) | ALLOWED (n_triggers>=2) | PRESERVED |
| 5/05 loser | No trendline signal | No change | N/A |
| 5/06 loser | No trendline signal | No change | N/A |
| 5/07 loser 1 | No trendline signal | No change | N/A |
| 5/07 loser 2 | No trendline signal | No change | N/A |

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper realizes ~14% of headline P&L
2. **Sample bias:** Real-fills OOS 307 trades / 345 days; midday autopsy 32 trades; selection method = all midday window trades
3. **Out-of-sample:** Real-fills OOS PASS (+89% lift vs ungated). No separate walk-forward run (real-fills used as OOS proxy per L23)
4. **Real-fills:** COMPLETE — 307 trades, ungated +3.8/trade → gated +7.2/trade. Top-3 J days: 4/29 gated +4/contract (vs ungated -15), 5/04 preserved +53.6/contract
5. **Failure modes:** (a) Gate blocks valid midday setups that happen to be 1-trigger — expected loss ~1-2/month; (b) Gate has no effect on AM (before 11:30) or late-PM (after 14:00) sessions; (c) Worst case: blocks a winner during chop — estimated <1/quarter
6. **Concentration:** top5=51%, 12/17 months positive — PASS per leaderboard

## Confidence

9/10 — Mechanistic explanation (1-trig midday losers) is robust. Anchor preservation confirmed. +89% lift on 307 real-fills is strong evidence. Only gym validation remains.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements rank 17 (V14E_BEAR_TIME_OF_DAY_GATE) — adjacent time windows (10:xx-11:xx chop zone blocked by rank 17; 11:30-14:00 midday zone blocked by this candidate). No conflict with other leaderboard entries.
